All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ApplicationInfo
Encapsulates the SDK's application metadata.
ApplicationInfoBuilder
Contains methods for configuring the SDK's application metadata.
ArrayBuilder
A builder created by LDValue.buildArray().
AttributeRef
An attribute name or path expression identifying a value within an LDContext.
AutoEnvContextModifier
An IContextModifier that will add a few context kinds with environmental information that is useful out of the box.
AutomaticModeSwitchingConfig
Granular control over which events trigger automatic connection mode switches.
AutomaticModeSwitchingConfig.Builder
Builder for AutomaticModeSwitchingConfig.
BuildConfig
 
BuildConfig
 
CacheInitializerEntry
Entry for the cache-backed FDv2 initializer.
Callback<T>
General-purpose interface for callbacks that can succeed or fail.
ChangeSet<T>
Represents a set of changes to apply to a data store.
ChangeSetType
Indicates the type of a change set applied to a data store.
ClientContext
Configuration information provided by the LDClient when creating components.
ComponentConfigurer<T>
The common interface for SDK component factories and configuration builders.
Components
Provides configurable factories for the standard implementations of LaunchDarkly component interfaces.
ConnectionInformation
Provides various information about a current or previous connection.
ConnectionInformation.ConnectionMode
Enumerated type defining the possible values of ConnectionInformation.getConnectionMode().
ConnectionMode
Enumerates the built-in FDv2 connection modes.
ConnectionModeBuilder
Configures the data pipeline (initializers and synchronizers) for a single ConnectionMode.
ContextBuilder
A mutable object that uses the builder pattern to specify properties for LDContext.
ContextKind
A string identifier provided by the application to describe what kind of entity an LDContext represents.
ContextMultiBuilder
A mutable object that uses the builder pattern to specify properties for a multi-kind LDContext.
DataModel
Contains information about the internal data model for feature flag state.
DataModel.Flag
Represents the state of a feature flag evaluation received from LaunchDarkly.
DataSource
Interface for an object that receives updates to feature flags from LaunchDarkly.
DataSourceBuilder<TDataSource>
Interface for building FDv2 initializers and synchronizers.
DataSourceBuildInputs
Build inputs (dependencies and configuration) provided to DataSourceBuilder.build(DataSourceBuildInputs) when constructing FDv2 initializers and synchronizers.
DataSourceState
Data source status state.
DataSourceUpdateSink
Interface that an implementation of DataSource will use to push data into the SDK.
DataSourceUpdateSinkV2
Interface that an FDv2 DataSource will use to push data into the SDK.
DataSystemBuilder
Configures the SDK's data system: how and when the SDK acquires feature flag data across different platform states (foreground, background, offline, etc.).
DataSystemComponents
Factory methods for FDv2 data source components used with the DataSystemBuilder.
DiagnosticDescription
Optional interface for components to describe their own configuration.
EnvironmentMetadata
Metadata about the environment that flag evaluations or other functionalities are being performed in.
EnvironmentReporterBuilder
Builder for making an IEnvironmentReporter with various options.
EvaluationDetail<T>
An object returned by the SDK's "variation detail" methods such as boolVariationDetail, combining the result of a flag evaluation with an explanation of how it was calculated.
EvaluationReason
Describes the reason that a flag evaluation produced a particular value.
EvaluationReason.BigSegmentsStatus
Enumerated type defining the possible values of EvaluationReason.getBigSegmentsStatus().
EvaluationReason.ErrorKind
Enumerated type defining the possible values of EvaluationReason.getErrorKind().
EvaluationReason.Kind
Enumerated type defining the possible values of EvaluationReason.getKind().
EvaluationSeriesContext
Represents parameters associated with a feature flag evaluation.
EventProcessor
Interface for an object that can send or store analytics events.
EventProcessorBuilder
Contains methods for configuring delivery of analytics events.
FDv2EntryConverter
Converts FDv2 InitializerEntry / SynchronizerEntry configuration into internal DataSourceBuilder instances.
FDv2SourceResult
Result type for FDv2 initializers and synchronizers.
FDv2SourceResult.Status
Status payload for STATUS results.
FeatureFlagChangeListener
Callback interface used for listening to changes to a feature flag.
Hook
A Hook is a set of user-defined callbacks that are executed by the SDK at various points of interest.
HookConfiguration
Encapsulates the SDK's 'hooks' configuration.
HookMetadata
Metadata about the Hook implementation.
HookRunner
 
HookRunner.AfterIdentifyMethod
 
HookRunner.EvaluationMethod
 
HooksConfigurationBuilder
Contains methods for configuring the SDK's 'hooks'.
HttpConfiguration
Encapsulates top-level HTTP configuration that applies to all SDK components.
HttpConfigurationBuilder
Contains methods for configuring the SDK's networking behavior.
IContextModifier
Modifies contexts when invoked.
IdentifySeriesContext
Represents parameters associated with calling identify.
IdentifySeriesResult
The result applies to a single identify operation.
IdentifySeriesResult.IdentifySeriesStatus
The status an identify operation completed with.
IEnvironmentReporter
Reports information about the software/hardware environment that the SDK is executing within.
Initializer
Interface for an FDv2 data source initializer that produces a single result.
InitializerEntry
Declarative configuration for an FDv2 initializer source in a ConnectionMode.
InitializerFromCache
Marker interface for an initializer that is used to load data from the cache and will be run synchronously when the data source is started.
JsonSerializable
Marker interface for SDK classes that have a custom JSON serialization.
JsonSerialization
Helper methods for JSON serialization of SDK classes.
LaunchDarklyException
Exception class that can be thrown by LaunchDarkly client methods.
LDAllFlagsListener
Callback interface used for listening to changes to the flag store.
LDAndroidLogging
Allows LaunchDarkly log output to be sent directly to the native Android Log API.
LDClient
Client for accessing LaunchDarkly's Feature Flag system.
LDClientInterface
The interface for the LaunchDarkly SDK client.
LDConfig
This class exposes advanced configuration options for LDClient.
LDConfig.Builder
A builder that helps construct LDConfig objects.
LDConfig.Builder.AutoEnvAttributes
Enable / disable options for Auto Environment Attributes functionality.
LDContext
A collection of attributes that can be referenced in flag evaluations and analytics events.
LDFailure
Container class representing a communication failure with LaunchDarkly servers.
LDFailure.FailureType
Enumerated type defining the possible values of LDFailure.getFailureType().
LDFutures
Helpers for asynchronous results, including settable futures and anyOf for racing completions.
LDGson
A helper class for interoperability with application code that uses Gson.
LDHeaderUpdater
An interface to provide the SDK with a function used to modify HTTP headers before each request to the LaunchDarkly service.
LDInvalidResponseCodeFailure
Container class representing a communication failure with LaunchDarkly servers in which the response was unexpected.
LDJackson
A helper class for interoperability with application code that uses Jackson.
LDPackageConsts
Constants related to the SDK package
LDStatusListener
Listener for various SDK state changes.
LDTimberLogging
Allows LaunchDarkly log output to be forwarded to Timber.
LDTimberLogging.Adapter
A Timber implementation of the LDLogAdapter interface.
LDUser
Deprecated.
use LDContext instead.
LDUser.Builder
Deprecated.
use ContextBuilder or ContextMultiBuilder instead via LDContext.builder(String).
LDUtil
Various utility functions
LDValue
An immutable instance of any data type that is allowed in JSON.
LDValue.Convert
Predefined instances of LDValue.Converter for commonly used types.
LDValue.Converter<T>
Defines a conversion between LDValue and some other type.
LDValueType
Describes the type of an LDValue.
ModeDefinition
Defines the initializers and synchronizers for a single ConnectionMode.
NoOpContextModifier
Context modifier that does nothing to the context.
ObjectBuilder
A builder created by LDValue.buildObject().
PersistentDataStore
Interface for a data store that holds feature flag data and other SDK properties in a simple string format.
Plugin
Abstract class that you can extend to create a plugin to the LaunchDarkly SDK.
PluginMetadata
 
PluginsConfiguration
Encapsulates the SDK's 'plugins' configuration.
PluginsConfigurationBuilder
Contains methods for configuring the SDK's 'plugins'.
PollingDataSourceBuilder
Contains methods for configuring the polling data source.
PollingInitializerEntry
Entry for the FDv2 polling initializer.
PollingSynchronizerEntry
Entry for the FDv2 polling synchronizer.
RegistrationCompleteResult
Result of attempting to register all configured Plugins during SDK initialization.
RegistrationCompleteResult.Failure
Indicates that one or more plugins failed to register.
RegistrationCompleteResult.Failure.PluginFailure
Details about a single plugin's registration failure.
RegistrationCompleteResult.Success
Indicates that all plugins registered successfully.
SdkMetadata
Metadata about the LaunchDarkly SDK.
Selector
Identifies a specific version of data in the LaunchDarkly backend, used to request incremental updates from a known point.
SelectorSource
Provides the current Selector for an FDv2 data store.
SerializationException
General exception class for all errors in serializing or deserializing JSON.
ServiceEndpoints
Specifies the base service URIs used by SDK components.
ServiceEndpointsBuilder
Contains methods for configuring the SDK's service URIs.
SourceResultType
Indicates whether an FDv2 source result carries a change set or a status update.
SourceSignal
Represents the state of an FDv2 data source when emitting a status result.
StreamingDataSourceBuilder
Contains methods for configuring the streaming data source.
StreamingSynchronizerEntry
Entry for the FDv2 streaming synchronizer.
Synchronizer
Interface for an FDv2 data source synchronizer that produces a stream of results.
SynchronizerEntry
Declarative configuration for an FDv2 synchronizer source in a ConnectionMode.
TestData
A mechanism for providing dynamically updatable feature flag state in a simplified form to an SDK client in test scenarios.
TestData.FlagBuilder
A builder for feature flag configurations to be used with TestData.
TestData.FlagBuilder.VariationFunc<T>
A functional interface for use with TestData.FlagBuilder.variationFunc(VariationFunc) or TestData.FlagBuilder.variationIndexFunc(VariationFunc).
TrackSeriesContext
Represents parameters associated with tracking a custom event.
TransactionalDataSourceUpdateSink
Interface that an implementation of DataSource will use to push data into the SDK transactionally.
TransactionalDataStore
Interface for a data store that holds feature flags and related data received by the SDK.
UserAttribute
Deprecated.
LDUser replaced by LDContext
